samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations. Implements control signals for clock, reset, start, and completion flag generation. Performs multiplication based on inputs and outputs the result through yout while signaling completion via done.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Chip clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Reset = 0, reset inactive = 1.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input signal with a data width of 16 bits.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input signal with a data width of 16 bits.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 32 bits.</output>
        <output id="done">Chip output flag signal. Done = 1 indicates completion of multiplication operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Multiplies two 16-bit numbers using shift-and-add method. Resets on rst_n low, updates on clk rising edge, and sets done flag after 16 shifts. Outputs the final product in yout.</implementation>
</module>
